item.title: 23andMe & GLP-1 Genetics
item.description:
• Summary: 23andMe is investigating genetic variations associated with weight loss responses to GLP-1 receptor agonists, such as semaglutide, to personalize obesity and diabetes management strategies.
  • MoAs: GLP-1 receptor agonists (e.g., semaglutide, liraglutide) work by activating GLP-1 receptors to increase insulin secretion, decrease glucagon release, slow gastric emptying, and reduce appetite, thereby improving glycemic control and promoting weight loss.
  • Sources: STAT News

item.title: Eli Lilly's Foundayo (Fondaparinux) Launch
item.description:
• Summary: Eli Lilly has launched Foundayo (fondaparinux), an anticoagulant, following regulatory approval. This launch intensifies competition in the thrombosis market, particularly with Novo Nordisk, amid ongoing merger and acquisition trends and tariff impacts. Foundayo is indicated for venous thromboembolism prevention in surgical patients, expanding Lilly's cardiovascular portfolio.
  • MoAs: Fondaparinux is a selective factor Xa inhibitor, preventing thrombin formation and blood clot development.
  • Sources: Biospace

item.title: Hypertension Control Community Teams
item.description:
• Summary: A community team approach is emphasized for better hypertension control, involving healthcare providers, community workers, and patients. This strategy aims to improve treatment adherence and monitoring, reducing cardiovascular risks associated with high blood pressure through collaborative care models.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News
